## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss next steps for GrowthX's Series B funding round and potential partnership with HubSpot Ventures.](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HubSpot Ventures is excited to partner with GrowthX, potentially through a SAFE investment of $2-4M](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [GrowthX is experiencing strong growth (14 deals closed this month) and is cash flow positive ($1.2M collected)](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Both parties are eager to start the partnership soon, seeing strategic value in collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [GrowthX to decide on funding structure (SAFE vs. proper round) and amount after internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

## Topics

### Current Business Performance

  - [GrowthX closed 14 deals this month](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Collected $1.2M, likely to break even or be cash flow positive](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Recent notable clients include Lovable, CodeRabbit, Bubble, and BaseStand](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Sales process becoming more efficient; recent one-call close by new AE in 30 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Funding Considerations

  - [GrowthX comfortable with 18-24 month runway, burning $230-500K/month](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Considering raising $6-8M through SAFE or proper round](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [HubSpot Ventures offers $2-4M investment, prefers valuation cap on SAFE](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Other interested parties: angel investors, fractional CMOs, previous investors](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

### Strategic Partnership Value

  - [HubSpot seen as ideal strategic partner by Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Potential to accelerate go-to-market initiatives and engineering investments](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Opportunity to add more HubSpot customers as GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Market Position and Vision

  - [GrowthX's unique approach: generating valuable frontier data through paid work](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Addressing market need for productivity tools that solve real problems](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Confidence in product and traction, not desperate for funding](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to discuss internally with Daniel (CTO) and regroup with Karan (Madrona)](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Decide on funding structure (SAFE vs. proper round) and amount](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Determine preferences on valuation cap vs. discount for SAFE](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up with HubSpot Ventures team in the next few days](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [HubSpot Ventures to send templated side letter for SAFE, if needed](https://fathom.video/share/tnbGBKUXXfwA7E48MhLu_BPnk-Qkfqvk?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
